title: Machine for drafting a patent application and process for doing same
key_knowledge: An interactive computer-based system prompts the user for information to sequentially generate each section of a patent application, automatically incorporating legal requirements and formatting to reduce reliance on attorneys and ensure compliance with patent drafting standards.

title: Machine for drafting a patent application (granted version)
key_knowledge: This granted patent extends the interactive drafting system, using prompts and sequential section-building to guide users through drafting while automatically incorporating legal requirements and reducing cost and complexity【202668765432966†L90-L133】.

title: Patent drafting system
key_knowledge: The system analyzes patent documents by receiving application text, generating a claim chart showing dependencies, checking antecedent basis and support in descriptions and drawings, and producing a navigable claim hierarchy with diagnostic messages to help drafters ensure proper claim dependencies.

title: Patent drafting system (continuation)
key_knowledge: Continuation of US9990351B2, this system automates analysis of patent application text, generating claim charts with hierarchical structures and identifying missing antecedent basis or description support, improving drafting accuracy and compliance.

title: Patent drafting system (pre-grant)
key_knowledge: Pre-grant publication describing the system that receives patent text, generates claim charts and navigable claim hierarchy, checks antecedent support and claim dependencies, and provides diagnostic messages to facilitate drafting, with classification codes for natural language processing and text editing【466554677030338†L8-L24】.

title: Method and system to provide certified third party plug-ins into a patent drafting system
key_knowledge: Enables software developers to create plug-ins for a patent drafting system, allowing modules such as prior-art search or claim formatting to be integrated. Modules can be reviewed and rated, enabling an ecosystem of certified extensions to enhance drafting functionality.

title: Systems and methods for analyzing semantic documents over a network
key_knowledge: An automated agent searches IP documents and ranks them according to user-selected tags or topics, then displays the results to help drafters gather prior art and relevant information for drafting patent applications.

title: A patent writing system and method
key_knowledge: This system includes a storage module, a template retrieval module, a selection module, and an import module. It stores patent application files and writing templates, retrieves templates based on customer information, selects patent files, and imports them into templates to automatically generate new patent application files with high efficiency【464572518303973†L109-L122】.

title: System, method, and recording medium for drafting and preparing patent specifications
key_knowledge: Defines a system using multiple computers connected via a communication network to draft and prepare patent specifications. The program stored on a medium allows inventors and attorneys to cooperate on drafting by sharing and storing patent text【934579562796160†L112-L119】.

title: Method of drafting a claim set
key_knowledge: Using a word-processing program with a toolbar, this method inserts old and novel limitations into claims, numbers and rearranges claims, duplicates claims into the specification, and builds elements like descriptions and abstracts, bringing consistency and efficiency to claim drafting【507270615458216†L92-L135】.

title: Automated system and method for patent drafting and technology assessment
key_knowledge: Combines patent drafting with technology assessment. Features and benefits of the invention, primary and secondary elements, and substitute elements are stored by a computer. Drafted sections are combined with predetermined text to compile the final patent application【39538135916017†L109-L119】.

title: System, method, and computer program product for developing and maintaining documents including patent specification analysis
key_knowledge: An early system that uses templates and indexes to enable users to prepare patent documents, analyzing a patent application’s specification and claims for consistency and completeness.

title: AI-based method and system for drafting patent applications
key_knowledge: Utilizes an AI machine to generate patent claims from a short description of an inventive concept and a second AI (quarry) to draft the full patent application based on the generated claims. The system includes a user interface and may store guidelines, additional information and constraints to tailor the draft【258521929121387†L648-L731】.

title: Systems and methods for extracting patent document templates from a patent corpus
key_knowledge: Applies machine learning and clustering to identify document templates from a corpus of patent documents. It filters the corpus based on parameters, clusters documents with common text, and extracts shared boilerplate templates to maintain consistency across patent drafts【547376811239672†L829-L923】.

title: Systems and methods for using machine learning and rules-based algorithms to create a patent specification based on human-provided patent claims
key_knowledge: Employs machine learning and rules-based algorithms to generate a full patent specification from a set of human-provided claims. The system builds data structures representing claims, transforms patentese into prose, organizes features, and constructs specification sections automatically【627342363800339†L2112-L2177】.

title: System for preparing a patent application (macro-based)
key_knowledge: A word-processing macro displays a toolbar with options to set up and number claims, build descriptions and introductions, build abstracts, format elements, mark elements, and generate element lists. It automatically brings consistency and numbers elements, creating claim trees and reordering dependencies【165204384472312†L121-L134】.

title: Method of automatically analyzing claims in patents
key_knowledge: A computer-implemented method automatically separates patent claims into structures, identifies transition phrases, and builds databases of transition and dependency phrases to analyze independent and dependent claims for understanding claim structure【949993441415635†L81-L139】.

title: Method for preparing a claim tree in the preparation of a patent application
key_knowledge: Uses a software macro to present a toolbar in a word processor, enabling numbering of claims, generating claim dependency trees (list and tree views), copying claim trees to the clipboard, and inserting claim notes, thereby helping drafters navigate and manage claim hierarchies【840679301912671†L97-L133】.

title: System for facilitating the preparation of a patent application
key_knowledge: A computer program stores a document template with headings and page breaks, prompts the user to compose claims, duplicates claims into the specification, replaces certain words to improve grammar, assigns reference numerals to elements, and automatically shifts numbering when claim order changes【661043157868727†L99-L137】.

title: Patent specification development system
key_knowledge: Manages the workflow for patent specification development, integrating templates and rules for sections. It allows collaboration among attorneys and analysts, handles invention disclosure forms, selects appropriate templates, and organizes work through project management and workflow tools【847029317858621†L96-L135】.
